title: Limnorchis longebracteata
taxonomy: Limnorchis longebracteata is classified as a type of orchid, specifically belonging to the family Orchidaceae. It is a genus of orchids found in Southeast Asia, particularly in Indonesia. Within the Orchidaceae family, Limnorchis longebracteata is further classified into the subfamily Epidendroideae. However, the exact classification within the subfamily may vary depending on the source. Additionally, the classification may be subject to revision as new research emerges.
uses: Unfortunately, I do not have any information about the medicinal uses of Limnorchis longebracteata.
